metadata.description: ClawHub — Operations, telemetry, content, and lifecycle management for the Claw bot fleet

plugins.name: claw-ops
plugins.description: Bot deployment, health checks, config review, and environment guard for the Claw fleet

plugins.name: bot-dashboard
plugins.description: UTI telemetry dashboard — onboard, status, offboard bots with sidecar bridge support

plugins.name: claw-content
plugins.description: Content skills for Claw bots — web search, Hebrew RTL handling, NotebookLM integration

plugins.name: claw-lifecycle
plugins.description: Lifecycle management — self-improvement routines, inter-bot escalation, telemetry push protocol

plugins.name: context-hub
plugins.description: Context Hub (chub) — search, fetch, and annotate fleet docs and skills via progressive MCP
